landing.title: BSP Identity
landing.subtitle: Where your biological sovereignty begins.
landing.subtitle_2: No accounts, no passwords, no central database.
landing.cta_create_desc: Register your permanent identity on Aptos.
landing.cta_access_desc: Open your dashboard with your sovereignty key.
landing.hero_tagline: Your biology. Your key. Permanent on Aptos.

create.title: Create Your BEO
create.subtitle: Choose your unique biological domain.
create.key_desc: Ambrosio Institute does not have a copy of these 24 words. They are the only way to recover your BEO if you lose this device. Do not take a screenshot.
create.key_confirm: I have stored these 24 words safely
create.guardian_desc: You can fragment your key to 3 trusted guardians now using Shamir Secret Sharing, or skip this step and rely only on your seed phrase.
create.registering_desc:
The Institute is paying the transaction fee.
Please wait...
create.success_desc: Your BEO {{domain}} is now permanently yours.

dashboard.no_key: No biological key found on this device.
dashboard.destroy_desc: Permanently destroy your key. All data on Aptos becomes irrecoverable and unusable. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.destroy_confirm: This will permanently destroy your cryptographic key. All your biological data will become permanently inaccessible. Continue?
dashboard.destroy_confirm_final: FINAL WARNING: This action is irreversible. Your BEO data will be cryptographically erased forever. Type 'DESTROY' to confirm.
dashboard.destroy_success: Key destroyed. All data is now permanently inaccessible and cryptographically erased.
dashboard.revoke_all_desc: Immediately revoke all active consent tokens. No institution will be able to access your data.
dashboard.revoke_all_confirm: This will revoke ALL active consents immediately. Continue?
dashboard.revoke_all_success: All consents revoked. No institution can access your data.
dashboard.rotate_key_desc: Generate a new Ed25519 key pair. Previous data will be re-encrypted. Old key becomes invalid.
dashboard.rotate_key_confirm: This will generate a new key and re-encrypt your data. Your seed phrase will change. Continue?
dashboard.rotate_key_success: Key rotated successfully. New seed phrase generated.
dashboard.lock_desc: Temporarily freeze your BEO. No data can be read or written while locked. Useful if you suspect unauthorized access.
dashboard.lock_success: BEO locked. All access is frozen.
dashboard.transfer_desc: Transfer your .bsp domain to another BEO holder. The new owner will control this domain.
dashboard.transfer_prompt: Enter the public key of the new owner:
dashboard.transfer_confirm: Transfer {{domain}} to {{newOwner}}? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.transfer_success: Domain transfer initiated. Pending confirmation from new owner.

cards.consent_desc: Manage who can read and send your biological data.
cards.guardians_desc: Shamir fragments for decentralized social recovery.
cards.export_desc: Export your Ed25519 key stored in this browser.

consent.title: Issue Consent
consent.subtitle: Authorize labs and clinics to interact with your BEO.
consent.manage_intents_desc: Custom data access intents registered for your BEO.

biorecords.title: BioRecords
biorecords.subtitle: Your biomarker history, permanently stored on Aptos.

guardians.title: Social Recovery
guardians.subtitle: Fragmentation of your key (Shamir) to 3 trusted guardians.
guardians.warning_1: 1. You will need the phones or emails of 3 highly trusted people.
guardians.warning_2: 2. Neither Ambrosio nor the Guardians will have your full key.
guardians.warning_3: 3. If you lose your Seed Phrase, you'll need 2 of 3 guardians to recover your BEO.
guardians.recovery_info: If you lose your key and have 3 guardians configured, you can initiate social recovery. 2 of 3 guardians must approve.

recover.title: Spatial Recovery
recover.subtitle: Lost access to this device? Restore your sovereignty here.
recover.social_desc: By starting this flow, a RecoveryRequest will be written to Aptos. You will need 2 of your 3 guardians to approve the key replacement.
recover.success: Sovereignty Restored! Key saved in browser successfully.

institution.title: Institutional Registration
institution.subtitle: Register your laboratory, hospital or research center on the BSP network.
institution.submissions_desc: All BioRecords submitted through your institution.
institution.consents_desc: Consents granted by BEO holders to your institution.
institution.lock_desc: Temporarily freeze all operations. No data can be submitted or read while locked.
institution.rotate_desc: Generate new Ed25519 key pair. Previous key becomes invalid.
institution.destroy_desc: Permanently destroy this IEO. All consent tokens are revoked. Data becomes irrecoverable.
institution.recovery_desc: Configure guardians for key recovery. If the institution loses access, 2 of 3 guardians can restore it.

split.create_subtitle: Your permanent biological identity on Aptos

footer.cta_subtitle: Your biology. Your data. Your rules.
footer.brand_tagline: Your biology. Your data. Your rules.

destroy.title: Sovereign Cryptographic Erasure
destroy.subtitle: Destroy your private key and render all your biological data permanently inaccessible.
destroy.no_identity_desc: We could not find a sovereignty key on this device. There is nothing to destroy.
destroy.warning_desc: Destroying your key makes all BioRecords encrypted for this BEO permanently unreadable. No institution, not even the Ambrosio Institute, can recover them.
destroy.ack_1: I understand this will permanently destroy my private key on this device.
destroy.ack_2: I understand all my BioRecords will become cryptographically unreadable forever.
destroy.ack_3: I have no intention of using this BEO again and have exported any data I want to keep.
destroy.confirm_desc: You are about to erase the following BEO from this device. This is your last chance to cancel before the final confirmation.
destroy.final_warning: FINAL WARNING. This is irreversible. Your data will be cryptographically erased forever.
destroy.error_generic: Something went wrong while destroying your key. Please try again.
destroy.success_desc: Your key has been destroyed. All data encrypted for this BEO is now permanently inaccessible and cryptographically erased.

export.title: Export my BioRecords
export.subtitle: Download all your biological data in a BSP-standard format. Your right under GDPR Article 20 and LGPD Article 18.
export.no_identity_desc: We could not find a sovereignty key on this device. Access your dashboard first.
export.section_desc: Your BioRecords are decrypted locally using your private key and exported in the selected format. Nothing is uploaded.
export.format_json_desc: Full BSP-standard structure, ideal for migration and audits.
export.format_csv_desc: Flat tabular format, ideal for spreadsheets and quick review.
export.error_generic: Something went wrong while exporting your data. Please try again.
export.compliance_note: This export complies with data portability requirements under GDPR Article 20 and LGPD Article 18. BioRecords are decrypted locally in your browser and never transmitted to any server.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this page. You can try again or return home.
